summary: Placeholder review lane added during generation-system hardening. The coverage-repair slice is useful as an evidence map and work queue, but synthesis boundaries have not been independently cleared.

findings.claim_or_issue: The candidate combines preclinical, registry, biomarker, safety, and pilot human evidence without a formal synthesis-compatibility grouping.
findings.why_it_matters: Without explicit compatibility checks, downstream consumers could mistake a track-level evidence map for a meta-analyzable evidence body.
findings.recommended_action: Keep the coverage assessment at vertical-slice scope and define synthesis groups before any formal synthesis or certainty assessment.
